internal_issues.description: §4.2.7 robustness para did not explicitly close orbit-moon-slower escape route
internal_issues.patch_applied: Added sentence: 'Even at the Moon's actual observed angular speed (~0.25°/min at the dome's published 2,534 km altitude), the dome geometry yields a totality duration of only ~7 seconds — still more than 20× short of the observed 138-second maximum — confirming the shortfall is structural, not an artefact of the assumed orbital speed.'

internal_issues.description: §4.2.2 closing para used 'acceptance window' (inverted semantic) instead of 'falsification window'

NEW: EXP-276.c2 H0 — P3 rewrite claims 'MST ≈ 7,000 km' for nine stations but 7,000 km is the 1D Δr-range (max_r − min_r), not an MST distance. Actual MST ~4,800–5,200 km. The 1.5× comparison to 4,500 km mid-disc arc is invalidated.
